response:
source
The function initializes two variables to track the sum of squares and the product of cubes before processing the input list.
***
If the input slice contains no elements, the sum of squares remains zero while the product of cubes defaults to one as required.
***
The algorithm iterates through each integer in the provided slice to calculate its square and add it to the running total.
***
During the same iteration loop, the cube of each integer is computed and multiplied into the accumulating product variable.
***
After all elements have been processed, the final sum and product values are packaged into a two-element array for return.
***
This implementation ensures that the mathematical operations are performed correctly for any valid set of whole numbers provided.
